---
name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a new feature for Harmonix
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
---

## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve? What is the user need?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. How should it work from a user's perspective?

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or features?

## Use Cases

Who would benefit from this feature and how? Be specific.

- **User A** (e.g., a Spotify Premium subscriber): would use it to ...
- **User B** (e.g., a local-files-only user): would use it to ...

## Mockups / Examples

(Optional) Add mockups, sketches, or examples from other apps that do something similar.

## Priority

How important is this to you?

- [ ] Critical (blocking my use of Harmonix)
- [ ] High (would significantly improve my workflow)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (just a thought)

## Additional Context

Anything else we should know?
